strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js product work and current hands-on AI agent/MCP development
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and testing workshop instructor
Solid cloud and infrastructure exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD) plus polyglot background including Java
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience; frontend history leans heavily on Ember.js with only one clearly React-based role
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and secondary (robotics tooling, ~2016-2018)
Significant career time invested in D-lang ecosystem projects, which has limited direct transfer to the stated stack
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with senior fullstack roles across product companies, brings current and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP tooling experience (rare and explicitly required), and demonstrates exceptional engineering rigor through TDD practice and authored testing tools. The gaps are framework-specific (Nest.js, modern React depth, Kotlin) rather than fundamental, and the track record of rapidly adopting new stacks across web, mobile, and embedded suggests these are low-risk to close.
